articles.title: P.E.I. to become first province to lower colorectal cancer screening age to 45
articles.description: Prince Edward Island is lowering its colorectal cancer screening age to 45 after several national health groups said the disease is increasingly impacting younger people. The province’s premier Rob Lantz announced it is the first in Canada to lower the age of the routine test and it will take effect

articles.title: Hate crimes numbers stayed steady in 2024 after years of increases: StatCan
articles.description: Statistics Canada says the number of police-reported hate crimes stayed steady in 2024, after sharp increases in prior years.
